title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: An AI you live with, not one you visit. A little bluebird settles into your computer — keeps your unfinished threads, learns your rhythms, and gets better at helping the longer you're together. Local-first: your life stays on your machine.

title: kritav/ScratchScript
summary: Claude Code for Scratch

title: buluoai6-eng/tencent-meeting-online-interview-assistant

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: Anders0nAZ/vram-monitor
summary: Local dashboard for GPU memory across concurrent AI workloads, with an idle watchdog that reclaims VRAM. Python, stdlib only.

title: MasihMoafi/Elpis
summary: You put an agent into an Elpis, and it becomes Elpis; Be Elpis my friend.

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: The runtime substrate for agentic systems — one Go binary, six LLM providers, MCP-native, configurable as a managed sandbox or full agentic dev environment. Where agents live, talk, and learn.

title: puremachinery/carapace
summary: A secure, stable Rust alternative to openclaw/moltbot/clawdbot

title: XAIHT/Tlamatini
summary: Tlamatini is a self-hosted AI developer assistant for local or cloud LLMs: hybrid RAG over your codebase, a 79-tool multi-turn engine, a 74-agent visual workflow designer, and ACPX, a runtime for external coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor and Gemini CLI.

title: ingStudiosOfficial/turtlebrowse
summary: A Material You themed JVM based agentic browser made in JCEF (Java Chromium Embedded Framework), Swing, and JavaFX.

title: eleiton/ollama-intel-arc
summary: Make use of Intel Arc Series GPU to Run Ollama, StableDiffusion, Whisper and Open WebUI, for image generation, speech recognition and interaction with Large Language Models (LLM).

title: Fortemi/fortemi
summary: Self-hosted AI knowledge base with hybrid semantic search (pgvector + FTS + RRF), MCP server, multi-provider LLM inference (Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, llama.cpp), multimodal ingestion (vision, audio transcription, speaker diarization), and knowledge graph. Rust + PostgreSQL.

title: shamantao/aitao
summary: Local-first AI document assistant — semantic search across your private files in any language or format. Privacy-focused, no cloud, no data leaks. Built with open-source tools on consumer hardware to minimize ecological footprint.

title: ritchieng/deep-learning-wizard
summary: Open source guides/codes for mastering deep learning to deploying deep learning in production in PyTorch, Python, Apptainer, and more.

title: dev-core-busy/jarvis
summary: Self-hosted autonomous AI agent for Linux — multi-LLM, real desktop control (VNC), WhatsApp, RAG knowledge base, sandboxed security layer, OpenClaw skills

title: bradleybond512/crystal-ball
summary: Tauri 2 desktop intelligence platform — Cesium.js 3D globe, 185 live panels, MCP server for Claude Code, and an explainable algorithm intelligence layer (truth scoring, evidence graph, compound risk, forecast calibration) plus shortage / weather / insights engines. 600+ deterministic tests.

title: itsdezen/dotfiles
summary: Personal macOS development environment using GNU Stow for dotfiles management.

summary: A prompt injection CTF challenge that you can run from your device.
